title: ShopGUIPlus - Discord Logs
description: A ShopGUIPlus Addon allowing you to add discord logs to the shop
body:
![Warning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1c523f03b3282b1963dc7a2bff5bf70b52f6b08.png)

If you have any problem contact me thorugh [Discord](https://discord.gg/RHabzhdzS5).

### Features
- Fully customizable log messages
- Hooks directly to ShopGUIPlus API

### Permissions
**shopguiplusdiscordlogs.reload** - allows the use of /reload ingame

The config file can be found [here](https://github.com/matanrrr/ShopGUIPlus-DiscordLogs/blob/main/src/main/resources/config.yml)

For support join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/RHabzhdzS5) server and don't forget to leave a review!
